title: Bulbophyllum sandersonii
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum sandersonii is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which includes approximately 30,000 species of orchids. This classification is further divided into the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Bulbophyllinae. The genus Bulbophyllum, which contains B. sandersonii, consists of over 2,000 species of orchids. These plants are native to tropical regions of the world, including Africa and Asia. They are known for their unique and diverse characteristics, making them a fascinating group of orchids.
